puzzle.hint: A beloved, oft-repeated supplication asking Allah for goodness in both this life and the Hereafter, and protection from Hellfire — the du'a of those who hope for Allah's mercy.
puzzle.arabic: وَمِنْهُم مَّن يَقُولُ رَبَّنَآ ءَاتِنَا فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةًۭ وَفِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ حَسَنَةًۭ وَقِنَا عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ
puzzle.verseEn: But among them is he who says, "Our Lord, give us in this world [that which is] good and in the Hereafter [that which is] good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire."
